title: Local AI plan dashboard
originalRequest: local dashboard로 해서 진행하자. 그리고 반드시 md 파일로 저장을 해서 다른 agent가 참조할 수 있도록 하자.
interpretedGoal: Create a private local dashboard workflow where multiple AI agents write shared plan records into a GitHub repository and refer to Markdown coordination documents.

tasks.title: Create Markdown planning documents
tasks.notes: Project plan, agent protocol, data schema, and roadmap were created.

tasks.title: Create sample data structure
tasks.notes: Add personal Codex and work Claude sample plan files.

tasks.title: Build local dashboard skeleton
tasks.notes: Use a local-first React/Vite dashboard unless the project direction changes.

updates.message: Created initial local dashboard plan record.
